text: sometimes it takes very long after the watchdog has responded with json until the json is parsed. can you check the waiting logic? it should check for no spinner + no "esc to cancel" and then check another 5 times with 100ms delay. same function as the idle checker for the main agnet

status.comment: Implemented robust idle check in watchdog: waits for 5 consecutive checks (100ms interval) of no-spinner state before parsing JSON response.
